description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
The subject Mercedes-Benz had the L2 system engaged and was stationary in slow moving traffic for approximately 3 seconds on the 405 S 
near the Bellflower exit when it was lightly struck in the rear bumper by a Lexus driven at approximately 5 mph.
